hero.title: Building AI systems for business, block by block.
hero.text: Automating sales, support, document workflows, and internal processes with AI agents, integrations, and workflow scenarios.
hero.panelText: Pixel aesthetics, engineering mindset, and modular architecture. Hrushevski AI Lab builds AI solutions, process automation, chatbots, and integrations for businesses.

items.title: AI assistants
items.text: Chatbots for websites, Telegram, CRM, and internal teams.

items.title: Business automation
items.text: We connect forms, CRM, spreadsheets, email, and messengers into one unified flow.

items.title: AI integrations
items.text: We plug in models, classification, response generation, and document processing.

items.title: Reliable architecture
items.text: Access control, logging, scenario governance, and support for growing teams.

cases.heading: Case studies
cases.description: Real results from AI automation: less routine, faster processes, more time for what matters.

items.title: Automated lead handling
items.text: Leads automatically land in CRM, get sorted by AI, and assigned to the right manager.

items.title: AI customer support
items.text: The bot handles FAQs, collects data, and escalates complex requests to a human.

items.title: Documents & reports
items.text: Generate templates, summaries, and internal reports without manual copy-pasting.

contact.heading: Let's discuss your project
contact.text: Tell us your challenge — we'll figure out what to automate first and how quickly it can deliver results.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what needs to be automated...
contact.successText: I'll get back to you within the day.

footer.heading: Business AI automation & smart systems
footer.text: hrshvski.com — building automation for businesses, AI agents, integrations, and digital systems for real-world company needs.
